headline: Bekasi flood disrupts collector roads
summary: Banjir di Bekasi menyebabkan genangan permukiman dan gangguan lalu lintas di jalan kolektor utama.
summary_id: Banjir di Bekasi menyebabkan genangan permukiman dan gangguan lalu lintas di jalan kolektor utama.
summary_en: Flooding in Bekasi caused residential inundation and traffic disruption on major collector roads.
